message:
Expand connection API, add WAL checkpointing, and page cache stats

Connection API (connection.rs, +465 lines):
- Add prepare(), execute(), query_row(), and transaction() methods with
  proper lifecycle management for a usable database API
- Introduce Statement, Transaction, and Rows types for ergonomic SQL
  execution with automatic cleanup
- Add ConnectionConfig and builder pattern for configuring page size,
  cache size, journal mode, and synchronous settings
- Create public Database facade in fsqlite/src/lib.rs wrapping Connection

WAL checkpointing (wal.rs, +162 lines):
- Implement checkpoint() method with CheckpointMode enum supporting
  Passive, Full, Restart, and Truncate modes
- Add WAL frame iteration for reading committed frames
- Implement frame-level CRC verification for data integrity validation

WAL adapter (wal_adapter.rs, +79 lines):
- Bridge core WAL trait with concrete WAL implementation
- Forward checkpoint requests and frame-read methods

Page cache stats (pager.rs, traits.rs):
- Add hit/miss counters to the page cache
- Define PageCacheStats trait for cache performance monitoring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
